title: More Stonecutter Recipes 2
description: Adds woodcutting and glasscutting support to the Stonecutter, with efficient recipes for logs, planks, and glass blocks.
body:
### More Stonecutter Recipes 2 – Expanded Wood & Glass Cutting

This datapack adds many new recipes to the Stonecutter, allowing you to process wood and glass directly, no crafting table needed. Unlike other packs, this one supports both materials in a single, streamlined system. It’s a remake of my 1.20.4 version, updated for Minecraft 1.21+.

You can turn Logs, Wood, and Planks into stairs, slabs, doors, signs, boats, and more – even hanging signs and ladders. Glass blocks are also supported, making decorative building faster and more intuitive.

Want to suggest a recipe or change something? Feel free to leave a comment on the [Planet Minecraft page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/more-stonecutter-recipes-1-21/), I’m happy to improve the pack!

**Blocks supported by the Stonecutter:**
- All types of Logs, Wood, and Planks
- Bamboo Blocks
- All Glass Blocks
